heading: Donor Advised Funds
label: G Donor Advised Funds
notes: Codification, , , which directed the addition of subchapter G at the end of chapter 42, without specifying the act to be amended, was executed by adding subchapter G at the end of chapter 42 of this title, which consists of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 109–280, title XII, § 1231(a)120 Stat. 1094Aug. 17, 2006
